tagline: The Smartsheet connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Smartsheet connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest data from Smartsheet into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: | | Ingestion frequency | The pipeline schedule depends on your latency and cost requirements.
key_takeaway: The Smartsheet connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
